agentRuns.label: Agent 1
agentRuns.reportSummary: The agent completed 0 of 4 tasks, partially completed 3, and failed 1.   The automated accessibility pass found 1 issue, including 1 higher-impact item. The final report was synthesized directly from recorded evidence because the model-based review step could not finish cleanly within the remaining run budget.

agentRuns.label: Agent 3
agentRuns.reportSummary: Navigation is inconsistent and unreliable: many visible buttons do nothing, others take seconds, and some labels lead to the wrong place. Only a few hash links (e.g., Route →) reliably scroll, while primary CTAs like Launch App, Start Converting, Swap, and Developers frequently fail to trigger a clear change. “Read Docs ⊞” routes back to the homepage instead of documentation. These mismatches, delays, and weak feedback make the site feel unsafe to proceed on.
